ingredients.item: 1 Place a small, dry skillet over medium heat and add the cumin and coriander. Toast for a few minutes, or until fragrant and slightly darker in color, stirring continuously. Transfer to a spice grinder or mortar and pestle. Toast the sesame seeds the same way, reserve 1 tablespoon, and add the rest to the spice grinder or mortar and pestle. Grind to a fine powder and place in a small bowl.
ingredients.original: 1 Place a small, dry skillet over medium heat and add the cumin and coriander. Toast for a few minutes, or until fragrant and slightly darker in color, stirring continuously. Transfer to a spice grinder or mortar and pestle. Toast the sesame seeds the same way, reserve 1 tablespoon, and add the rest to the spice grinder or mortar and pestle. Grind to a fine powder and place in a small bowl.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the pistachios and hazelnuts to the same skillet and toast over medium heat for a few minutes, or until fragrant, stirring often. Transfer the toasted nuts to a spice grinder and pulse a few times, maintaining a coarse texture. Add them to the bowl with the ground seeds.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the pistachios and hazelnuts to the same skillet and toast over medium heat for a few minutes, or until fragrant, stirring often. Transfer the toasted nuts to a spice grinder and pulse a few times, maintaining a coarse texture. Add them to the bowl with the ground seeds.

ingredients.item: 3 Add the salt, cayenne, and reserved sesame seeds to the bowl with the seeds and nuts and mix well.
ingredients.original: 3 Add the salt, cayenne, and reserved sesame seeds to the bowl with the seeds and nuts and mix well.

ingredients.item: 4 Store in an airtight container at room temperature and use within a few days.
ingredients.original: 4 Store in an airtight container at room temperature and use within a few days.

ingredients.item:
HUMMUS
2 large cloves garlic
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed
ingredients.original:
HUMMUS
2 large cloves garlic
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 36 ounces (1 kg) canned chickpeas, drained and ¾ cup (180 ml) of the liquid (aquafaba) reserved
ingredients.original: 36 ounces (1 kg) canned chickpeas, drained and ¾ cup (180 ml) of the liquid (aquafaba) reserved
